title: Dialpad vs Loom
description: Compare Dialpad vs Loom — a communication platform versus a video communication solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: Dialpad (Communication) and Loom (Video Communication) serve different primary purposes. Loom has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is communication or video communication capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between Dialpad and Loom?
faqs.answer: Dialpad is a communication tool, while Loom is a video communication platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can Dialpad replace Loom?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, Dialpad or Loom?
faqs.answer: Dialpad ($15-35/mo) and Loom (Free–$12.50/creator/mo) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
